messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The generated systemd units cannot start, and the crash-burst guard they claim is silently inert
What it solves: WHY THIS IS EXPEDITE. These units are the supervision layer. Because they had never been installed
here — and, as it turns out, COULD NOT have worked if they had been — the whole operator layer sat
dead for ~9h on 2026-07-13 and Telegram went silent. BL-359 (always-on Operator presence) is
blocked …
How it works: Every rendered unit is valid systemd

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-366 - The generated systemd units cannot start, and the crash-burst guard they claim is silently inert is complete.
